# All Fatih Funeral Home

All Fatih Funeral Home is a full-service funeral home located at 130 Lenox Ave in Oneida, New York. The business has a dedicated funeral team and maintains a large portfolio of 27,980 obituaries. They offer a comprehensive range of funeral-related products and services including caskets, candles, flowers, and cards, providing compassionate end-of-life services to the local community.

Source: https://all-fatih-funeral-home.zappy5.app

---

# Compassionate Care & Dignified Services in Oneida



### All Fatih Funeral Home offers immediate need support, thoughtful funeral planning, and memorial guidance with a dedicated team ready to assist your family at 130 Lenox Ave.









Contact Our Team



View Services






Serving families at 130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York — a dedicated funeral team, 27,980 obituaries, and a full selection of caskets, candles, flowers, and cards.














## Compassionate Funeral Services in Oneida


At All Fatih Funeral Home, we offer a comprehensive range of funeral-related services and products — from caskets, candles, flowers, and cards to personalized memorial guidance — all delivered with dignity and care.








### Funeral Services


We coordinate every detail of traditional and contemporary funeral services, ensuring a meaningful tribute that honors your loved one's life and legacy.







### Cremation Guidance


Our caring team walks you through every cremation option with transparency and respect, helping you make informed decisions during a difficult time.







### Pre-Need Planning


Plan ahead with confidence. Our pre-need specialists help you arrange every detail in advance, relieving your family of future emotional and financial burdens.







### Memorial Support


From custom caskets and floral arrangements to memorial candles and cards, we provide everything needed to create a beautiful, lasting remembrance.













## A Legacy of Compassionate Care


For generations, our team has been a steady presence for families in Oneida and the surrounding communities. These numbers reflect trust built over time, one family at a time.





27,980
Obituaries Preserved

A growing memorial archive honoring the lives and stories entrusted to our care.




130 Lenox Ave
Serving Oneida, NY

Our funeral home has been a pillar of support at this location, offering a comforting space for remembrance.




Dedicated
Funeral Team

Compassionate professionals committed to guiding you with dignity through every step of the arrangement process.


















## Memorial Touches That Speak From the Heart


Our team helps families select meaningful details — from hand-finished caskets to softly lit candles, fresh florals, and personalized cards — with quiet guidance and genuine care.












### Hand-Finished Caskets


Thoughtfully crafted with natural wood grains and quiet elegance, each casket reflects the dignity of a life well lived.











### Memorial Candles


A gentle, flickering light that offers comfort and a moment of quiet reflection during the service.











### Fresh Florals


Seasonal blooms arranged with tenderness, adding natural beauty and heartfelt sympathy to the farewell.











### Personalized Cards


Keepsake cards that carry handwritten sentiments, allowing family and friends to express their love and memories.







Our dedicated team is here to help you choose every detail with compassion and respect, ensuring the farewell feels personal and true.

















## We're Here to Guide You


Whether you need immediate assistance, are planning ahead, or have questions about memorial services, our dedicated funeral team at 130 Lenox Ave is ready to provide compassionate support.


Reach Out Today

# Compassionate Care & Comprehensive Funeral Services


At All Fatih Funeral Home, we understand that losing a loved one is one of life's most profound challenges. Our dedicated funeral team is here to guide you through every step with warmth, dignity, and practical support. From coordinating meaningful memorial services to helping you select the perfect remembrance items—including caskets, candles, flowers, and cards—we ensure your family receives the personalized care you deserve. With a legacy of over 27,980 obituaries entrusted to us, our commitment to the Oneida community remains unwavering.

Contact Our Team


















## Compassionate Funeral Services


Guiding you with clarity and care through every step of honoring a life, we offer three clear pathways to support your family's immediate, memorial, and pre-planning needs.











### Immediate Need Support


When a loss has just occurred, you need swift, gentle guidance. Our team is available 24/7 to walk you through the essential first steps — from transfer of your loved one into our care to coordinating with clergy, cemeteries, and medical offices. We handle the logistical weight so you can focus on your family.


Get Immediate Help










### Funeral & Memorial Coordination


Design a service that truly reflects a unique life. Whether you envision a traditional funeral, a contemporary celebration of life, or a graveside gathering, we help you select meaningful elements — from caskets and urns to candles, flowers, and personalized memorial cards — creating a dignified tribute that brings comfort to all who attend.


Plan a Service










### Pre-Need Planning


Lift a future burden from those you love by making decisions together, now. Our pre-planning advisors help you outline your wishes, explore casket and memorial product options, and lock in today's costs — all in a calm, pressure-free environment. It is one of the most thoughtful gifts you can give your family.


Start Pre-Planning












Memorial Products


## Honoring a Life with Tenderness


Each item we offer is chosen to help families create a meaningful tribute — a gentle expression of love, respect, and remembrance during difficult times.












### Caskets


Our caskets are crafted with dignity and care, providing a final resting place that reflects the unique spirit of your loved one. From warm, hand-finished woods to understated metal designs, each piece is selected to offer comfort through its beauty and craftsmanship.

Learn more  →











### Candles


Light has long been a symbol of hope and remembrance. Our memorial candles offer a gentle, flickering presence during services and visitations, creating a sacred space where families can gather, reflect, and feel the warmth of shared memories.

Learn more  →











### Flowers


Fresh floral arrangements speak when words are hard to find. We work with trusted local florists to create tasteful sprays, wreaths, and bouquets that honor your loved one's personality and bring natural beauty and comfort to the service.

Learn more  →











### Cards


Our memorial cards and stationery provide a lasting keepsake for family and friends. Featuring thoughtful designs, gentle typography, and quality paper, each card becomes a small treasure — a tangible reminder of a life celebrated and deeply loved.

Learn more  →





Inquire About Memorial Products












## Our Compassionate Support Process


A clear, gentle path guiding you from the first conversation to a meaningful memorial. Our dedicated funeral team at 130 Lenox Ave is here for you every step of the way.








1






### Listen


We begin by sitting with you, hearing your story, and understanding your family's unique needs, cultural traditions, and personal wishes — without any pressure or rush.







2






### Guide


With clarity and kindness, we walk you through every available option — from funeral services and casket selection to flowers, candles, and memorial cards — so you feel informed and supported.







3






### Arrange


Our experienced funeral team handles all the details — coordination, documentation, and logistics — so your family can focus on being together during this tender time.







4



### Remember


We help you create a lasting tribute — whether through a beautifully crafted obituary among our 27,980 archived stories, a personalized memorial service, or keepsakes that honor a life well-lived.








If you need immediate guidance or have questions about funeral services in Oneida, our team is available to listen.

Contact Our Team











## You Don't Have to Navigate This Alone


At All Fatih Funeral Home, our dedicated funeral team is here to guide you through every step of arranging funeral services and selecting memorial products. From caskets and candles to flowers and cards, we ensure each detail is handled with the compassion and respect your family deserves. Our large portfolio of over 27,980 obituaries reflects a legacy of trust and care in the Oneida community. Reach out to our funeral team today and let us support you during this sensitive time.


Speak With the Funeral Team














Providing compassionate care and dignified services to families in their time of need.

# A Legacy of Remembrance


Honoring lives with dignity and compassion in Oneida










A quiet space for reflection and remembrance






At All Fatih Funeral Home, our memorial legacy is built on generations of trust. Our comprehensive obituary collection stands as a meaningful record of remembrance, preserving the stories that shape our community. Each entry reflects the dedicated care we provide to every family, ensuring that every life is honored with the dignity it deserves.


Located at 130 Lenox Ave in Oneida, New York, our dedicated funeral team guides you through every step with compassion. Whether you are planning ahead or need immediate funeral services, we offer a peaceful space and a comprehensive range of memorial products including caskets, candles, flowers, and cards to create a truly personal tribute.



27,980
Obituaries Archived
A living history of our community


















## In Loving Memory


Honoring the lives entrusted to our care. Our archive holds 27,980 obituaries, each a cherished story. For guidance on memorial notices and remembrance, please reach out to our compassionate team.










### Margaret Eleanor Whitfield


A beloved teacher and devoted mother whose kindness touched generations of students in the Oneida community.


March 12, 1934 — November 28, 2024







### Robert James Callahan


Proud veteran and master carpenter who built not just homes, but a legacy of integrity and quiet strength.


July 5, 1941 — October 15, 2024







### Dorothy Anne Sullivan


Loving grandmother and avid gardener whose flowers brightened the neighborhood and whose heart brightened every life she met.


September 20, 1948 — December 1, 2024







### Thomas Henry Mitchell


Dedicated firefighter and community volunteer who served Oneida with courage and compassion for over thirty years.


January 18, 1955 — August 22, 2024







### Catherine Rose DeLuca


Talented musician and choir director whose voice lifted spirits at St. Patrick's for four decades.


April 3, 1960 — October 9, 2024







### Arthur David Kowalski


Local business owner and family man whose warm smile and generous spirit defined Main Street for over 50 years.


December 10, 1938 — July 14, 2024








For assistance with memorial notices, obituary submissions, or funeral services, our team is here to guide you with compassion and respect.

Contact Our Team












## Honoring Every Life with Dignity & Remembrance


At All Fatih Funeral Home, we believe that every life tells a story worth preserving. For generations, our compassionate funeral team has served Oneida and the surrounding communities from our home at 130 Lenox Ave, creating a sacred space where memories are cherished and legacies endure.


Our portfolio of over 27,980 obituaries stands as a testament to the trust families place in us. Each entry is more than a record—it is a thread in the fabric of our community, a place for reflection, and a bridge connecting past, present, and future generations.




"To live in hearts we leave behind is not to die."

— Thomas Campbell


Whether you are searching for a loved one's memorial, planning ahead, or seeking solace in shared remembrance, our doors are open. We offer a comprehensive range of funeral services, from traditional caskets and memorial candles to floral arrangements and personalized cards, all delivered with the warmth and respect your family deserves.

Browse Memorial Records
























## Expressions of Care & Remembrance


Thoughtfully chosen tributes that honor a life and comfort those who grieve. Each offering is an extension of the compassionate funeral services we provide, helping families express what words cannot.











### Floral Arrangements


From delicate sympathy bouquets to personalized casket sprays, our floral tributes convey love, respect, and enduring memory with natural grace.









### Memorial Candles


A gentle, flickering light to honor a life. Our personalized memorial candles offer a quiet focal point for reflection during services and at home.









### Remembrance Cards


Beautifully crafted prayer cards, acknowledgment notes, and memorial stationery that help families share gratitude and preserve cherished memories.









### Caskets & Keepsakes


A dignified selection of caskets and lasting keepsake urns, selected with care to reflect the unique spirit of your loved one within our funeral services.

















## We Are Here to Help


For assistance with memorial notices, obituary-related questions, or remembrance planning, our dedicated funeral team is available to guide you with compassion and care.














130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York, US

## Meet Our Caring Funeral Team in Oneida — All Fatih Funeral Home

URL: https://all-fatih-funeral-home.zappy5.app/about
Description: Learn about All Fatih Funeral Home&#39;s compassionate team and our commitment to the Oneida community. Trust us for supportive, professional funeral services.

Meet Our Caring Funeral Team in Oneida — All Fatih Funeral Home






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Services & Memorial Products
- Obituaries & Memorials
- About & Funeral Team



Contact













## A Place of Compassion & Dignity in Oneida


At All Fatih Funeral Home, located at 130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York, we understand the weight of saying goodbye. Our home was established to serve as a sanctuary for families during their most tender moments, offering a steadfast hand and a gentle heart. We are not just a funeral service provider; we are your neighbors, dedicated to honoring the lives and legacies of those who have shaped our community.


Our dedicated funeral team brings together decades of experience in compassionate care, ensuring that every service is a true reflection of the individual. With a legacy spanning over 27,980 obituaries, we have had the profound privilege of walking alongside countless families. We believe that every farewell should be as unique as the life it celebrates, which is why we offer a comprehensive range of services and memorial products, from elegant caskets and candles to fresh flowers and personalized memorial cards.


We are committed to providing a warm, inviting space where memories are cherished and healing begins. Whether you are seeking immediate guidance or planning ahead, All Fatih Funeral Home is here to support you with integrity, reverence, and unwavering compassion.

















## Our Caring Team


Every member of our staff is dedicated to providing compassionate and respectful funeral services. We are here to guide you with warmth, understanding, and unwavering support during your time of need.













### Michael O'Connor


Funeral Director & Owner


With over 25 years of experience, Michael leads our team with a gentle hand and a deep commitment to honoring every life story. He believes that every family deserves to feel heard and supported.











### Sarah Mitchell


Arrangement Counselor


Sarah walks alongside families to create meaningful tributes. Her thoughtful approach ensures that every detail, from memorial products to service flow, reflects the unique spirit of your loved one.











### David Chen


Service Director


David coordinates every aspect of the service with precision and grace. He ensures that families can focus on remembrance while he handles the logistics with the utmost care.











### Emily Rivera


Grief Support Coordinator


Emily provides a compassionate presence and connects families with resources for healing. She is dedicated to ensuring that no one walks through loss alone.











### Robert Thompson


Obituary & Memorial Specialist


Robert helps families craft beautiful obituaries and lasting memorials. With a background in writing and a heart for service, he ensures every tribute tells a meaningful story.











### Linda Park


Aftercare & Products Coordinator


Linda assists families with selecting meaningful keepsakes, from caskets and candles to flowers and cards. Her gentle guidance helps create tangible connections to cherished memories.
















## Our Guiding Values


Every family we serve is met with unwavering compassion, profound dignity, and a deep commitment to our community.












### Compassion


We understand that losing a loved one is one of life's most difficult journeys. Our funeral team listens with open hearts, offering gentle guidance and personalized funeral services that honor your family's unique needs and traditions.









### Dignity


Every life deserves to be celebrated with the utmost respect. From selecting a beautiful casket to arranging memorial candles and flowers, we ensure every detail reflects the honor and grace your loved one deserves.









### Community


For years, All Fatih Funeral Home has been a cornerstone in Oneida. We are more than a funeral home; we are neighbors supporting neighbors, maintaining a lasting legacy through our extensive portfolio of 27,980 obituaries and ongoing memorial events.











Our Location

## Serving Families from the Heart of Oneida


All Fatih Funeral Home is located at 130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York, providing a peaceful and welcoming environment for local families during their time of need. Our home is designed to be a place of comfort, where conversations about arrangements, remembrance, and honoring a life well-lived can happen with dignity and warmth.


We are deeply rooted in the Oneida community, offering compassionate end-of-life services that respect every family's traditions and wishes. Whether you are seeking immediate guidance or planning ahead, our dedicated funeral team is here to support you with care and professionalism.




Get Directions


130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York, US




















## You Don't Have to Walk This Path Alone


At All Fatih Funeral Home, our dedicated team is here to guide you with compassion and care. Whether you need immediate assistance or wish to begin thoughtful funeral planning for the future, we welcome you to reach out. Located at 130 Lenox Ave in Oneida, New York, we are honored to serve families throughout the community with a full range of funeral services, memorial products, and a legacy of over 27,980 obituaries entrusted to our care.


Contact Us

### Visit the Home


All Fatih Funeral Home is located at 130 Lenox Ave in Oneida, New York. Families are welcome to visit and speak with our dedicated funeral team in a peaceful and respectful environment.









### Speak With the Team


Our compassionate staff is available to guide you through funeral services, memorial planning, and all end-of-life arrangements. We are here to listen and support your family with care and dignity.









### Memorial Support


From caskets and candles to flowers and cards, we offer a full range of memorial products to honor your loved one. Our large portfolio of 27,980 obituaries reflects our enduring commitment to the community.













## You Don't Have to Navigate This Alone




At All Fatih Funeral Home, we understand that making funeral arrangements can feel overwhelming. Our dedicated funeral team is here to walk beside you with compassion, guiding you through every decision with gentle expertise. Whether you are planning ahead or facing an immediate need, we are committed to providing the care and support your family deserves.




Located at 130 Lenox Ave in Oneida, New York, our doors are always open to offer a comforting hand and a listening heart.












Providing compassionate care and dignified services to families in their time of need.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://all-fatih-funeral-home.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















## A Legacy of Compassionate Care


For generations, our team has been a steady presence for families in Oneida and the surrounding communities. These numbers reflect trust built over time, one family at a time.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/5/2026



All Fatih Funeral Home ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: All Fatih Funeral Home

- Email: buellm900@gmail.com

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: 130 Lenox Ave, Oneida, New York, US



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://all-fatih-funeral-home.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















## A Legacy of Compassionate Care


For generations, our team has been a steady presence for families in Oneida and the surrounding communities. These numbers reflect trust built over time, one family at a time.







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



All Fatih Funeral Home is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: All Fatih Funeral Home

- Email: buellm900@gmail.com

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Providing compassionate care and dignified services to families in their time of need.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://all-fatih-funeral-home.zappy5.app/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















## A Legacy of Compassionate Care


For generations, our team has been a steady presence for families in Oneida and the surrounding communities. These numbers reflect trust built over time, one family at a time.







# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - All Fatih Funeral Home

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Funeral Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


All Fatih Funeral Home provides Funeral Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by All Fatih Funeral Home. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties
